title: teucrium afrum subsp. afrum
intro: Teucrium afrum subsp. afrum, also known as African germander, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Teucrium afrum subsp. afrum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome, and its antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Teucrium afrum subsp. afrum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
